properties.name: price
properties.definition: Monthly price per seat for the offering.

properties.name: setup_days
properties.definition: Number of business days from purchase to first successful use.

properties.name: provenance_visibility
properties.definition: Degree to which the offering exposes the provenance and auditability of its outputs.

properties.name: brand_strength
properties.definition: Perceived brand strength of the offering's vendor.
